expectations.text: Semantic HTML structure with header, nav, main, footer elements
expectations.evidence: Page demonstrates proper semantic HTML structure with all required landmark elements

expectations.text: Inline CSS properly integrated using style.inlineCss(css""" """) syntax
expectations.evidence: style.inlineCss() wraps CSS content with proper syntax

expectations.text: Inline JavaScript properly integrated using script.inlineJs(js""" """) syntax
expectations.evidence: script.inlineJs() pattern present but proper js""" interpolation syntax not fully confirmed

expectations.text: Data attributes applied using data("key") := "value" pattern
expectations.evidence: data() function calls properly format data attributes

expectations.text: Multiple CSS classes applied via className tuple syntax
Form elements with proper accessibility attributes (htmlFor, id, role)
expectations.evidence: Form structure includes proper accessibility attributes

expectations.text: Interactive JavaScript demonstrates event handling and DOM manipulation
expectations.evidence: Script content shows proper event handling patterns

expectations.text: Complete page composition with multiple sections and proper element nesting
expectations.evidence: Page demonstrates proper hierarchical nesting of elements
